title: oxytropis leucantha subsp. jordalii
intro: Oxytropis leucantha subsp. jordalii, also known as Jordal's mountain milkvetch, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family and is native to the mountainous regions of Norway. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Oxytropis leucantha subsp. jordalii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried roots and leaves in hot water, which can be used to treat various health issues.
